title: Debilitate
description:
Deal 10 damage.
[gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Weak[/gold] are twice as effective against the enemy for the next 3 turns.
upgraded_description:
Deal 12 damage.
[gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Weak[/gold] are twice as effective against the enemy for the next 4 turns.
